Container.Name: JobTrackr
Container.Overview: Self-hosted job-application tracker: a Kanban board for your job search, with resume storage, contacts, follow-up reminders, and an analytics view. Connects to a PostgreSQL database that you already run (no database is included). The database connection is configured from the web UI on first launch.
Container.Requires: Requires a reachable PostgreSQL server. You provide its host, port, database, username, and password in the setup wizard on first launch.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the JobTrackr web interface.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the saved database connection (setup.json) and uploaded resumes. Keep this mapped or you will lose both on update.

Container.Description:
Self-hosted job-application tracker.
JobTrackr is a Kanban-style tracker for your job search, with resume storage, contacts, follow-up reminders, and an analytics view. It runs as a single container and connects to a PostgreSQL database that you already run; it does not include a database.
On first launch, open the WebUI and complete the setup wizard: enter your PostgreSQL host, port, database, username, and password, then create the admin account. The connection string and uploaded resumes are stored in the App Data path.
